case_title: SKRUZNY, V. VINCENT VS CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO MUNICIPAL

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO MUNICIPAL RAILWAYPUBLIC UTILITY COMMISSION BUREAU OF CLAIMS AND CONTRACTS
SUBPOENA RECEIVED BY MAYOR'S OFFICE; SIGNATURE OF SERVER LEFT OUT ON POS.

MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,070.93 FILED BY SKRUZNY, V. VINCENT AS TO DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO MUNICIPAL RAILWAYPUBLIC UTILITY COMMISSION BUREAU OF CLAIMS AND CONTRACTS ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR FEB-22-1994 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 05

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SKRUZNY, V. VINCENT IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO MUNICIPAL RAILWAYPUBLIC UTILITY COMMISSION BUREAU OF CLAIMS AND CONTRACTS STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
